response:
Sec. 1  
peanuts are a type of food that contains proteins which can trigger allergic reactions in some individuals  
allergic reactions can cause symptoms such as difficulty breathing and swelling of the lips  
these reactions are not related to the physical properties of the food itself  
the ability to live underwater is not related to the immune system or the proteins in peanuts  
allergies are not caused by the environment or the physical state of the food  

Sec. 2  
the human body is designed for life on land and not for submersion in water  
the structure of the body does not allow for the movement or survival in water  
the physical properties of peanuts do not affect the ability to live underwater  
the immune system is not affected by the state of the food in water  
the ability to live underwater is not related to the proteins in peanuts
